title: Frontend Batch 10 - Pagination and Search Failure State Reinforcement
summary: Reinforced deterministic public and admin pagination/search failure-state coverage with minimal production fixes for unsafe public error copy, stale Study restore query handling, search-empty copy, and admin bulk selection leakage.
intentionallyNotChanged: Real storage or seeded backend data
behaviorBugsFound: Public incremental load failures could display arbitrary thrown error text.
Stale mobile Study restore state for a different query could suppress current mobile responsive query normalization.
Public Works and admin blog/work search-empty states used generic empty-list copy.
Admin blog/work bulk selection could remain active after search or page changes.

validation.command: npx skills find "nextjs pagination search failure testing"
validation.notes: Low-install external skills found; no skill installed.

validation.result: failed before fixes, passed after fixes
failed before fixes, passed after fixes

remainingGaps: Browser-level public initial server-component empty/search states still need deterministic API mocking infrastructure.
Admin URL-driven selection clearing was covered through component behavior rather than browser history E2E.
Normalized search helper edge cases were not broadened because no relevant helper bug was found.
recommendation: Proceed to the next frontend reinforcement batch around helper edge cases or remaining P2 gaps from the coverage audit.
